---
description: Requests to disconnect account(s).
---

# disconnect

Requests to disconnect account(s).

## Usage

:::code-group

```ts twoslash [example.ts]
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":2,"hash":"4783d55fc3e5f44bd05cdd6fb7d23223abae857a530c850060a98f4785207ca4","data":""}
import { walletClient } from './config'
 
const { accounts } = await walletClient.disconnect() // [!code focus]
```

```ts twoslash [config.ts] filename="config.ts"
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":2,"hash":"ad9c323b7bb0535e2e8aa8b192888c12f4860da00fabe3561e50d3857ed49820","data":""}
import 'viem/window'
// ---cut---
import { createWalletClient, custom } from 'viem'
import { mainnet } from 'viem/chains'
import { erc7846Actions } from 'viem/experimental'

export const walletClient = createWalletClient({
  chain: mainnet,
  transport: custom(window.ethereum!),
}).extend(erc7846Actions())
```

:::
